creator: wbe@psr.com
text:
Bug 1: "... or the files in the directory /usr/share/misc/magic ..."

/usr/share/misc/magic is a file, not a directory.

Bug 2: "In addition, if ... $HOME/.magic exists, it will be used in preference to the system magic files."

No.  $HOME/.magic is "in addition to", not "in preference to".  If you meant to say that $HOME/.magic is checked first, before the system file, allowing one to override what the system file would have said, then say checked first, but it's definitely not "instead of".
